articles.summary: Użytkownicy aplikacji mObywatel zyskali możliwość dostępu do kolejnych zasobów. Ministerstwo Sprawiedliwości zapowiedziało także, że za dwa miesiące aplikacja zostanie rozszerzona o funkcję umożliwiającą weryfikację danych sądowych.

Family offices piled into oil after capital dried up. The recent rally has made for big gains
articles.summary: After ESG pressures forced private equity investors out of oil and gas, investment firms of ultra-wealthy families stepped up.

articles.title: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn doesn't rule out the 2030 games: 'I would only do it if I could be fast'
articles.summary: Lindsey Vonn told CNBC Sport she's not ruling out a return to the Olympics in 2030, at age 45, if she can still perform at a high level.

articles.title: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
articles.summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

articles.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
articles.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
